'''Saluc''' was a [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Officer/Legends|officer]] in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], serving under a [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] onboard the ''[[Dewback's Burden]]''. The ship was ambushed by the [[Eiattu pirates]] who left the crew to [[Death/Legends|die]] slowly as their [[Oxygen/Legends|oxygen]] gave out. In this manner Saluc died.

==Appearances==
*{{Tales|5|Lando's Commandos: On Eagles' Wings}} {{1st}}
